channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Untaxed Car, 12th April
item.description:
The grey Renault (WR74 RUU) is using the road network untaxed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kendall Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th April
item.description:
Rubbish blocking path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayow Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 12th April
item.description:
Duvet cover flytipped on wall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Keverne Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Industrial sand bag on the pavement for 6 months, 12th April
item.description:
A large industrial sandbag has been on the pavement next to 56 Flaxton Road for over six months after they did renovation work, and it still hasn’t been removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Flaxton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 328B Kilburn High Road, opposite Brondesbury overground and next to a bus stop, 12th April
item.description:
The shop is displaying its contents outside the demise of the property, causing obstruction and trip hazards. It's right next to a bus stop and cause the pavement to narrow and push people waiting for a bus onto the main road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley and rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
Trolley and rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipped Sofas in the Communal Walkway, 12th April
item.description:
There are several sofas in the main communal walkway between the two blocks of Priory Court that have been there for several weeks. Please can you organise to have these removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stuart Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 2 Honiton Road, 12th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped their old Christmas tree. It has been there for weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Honiton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th April
item.description:
This rubbish has blown over the road and has been sat there for more than 6 days, it is unhygienic and used sanitary had to be cleared by a resident of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree uprooted & leaning over, 12th April
item.description:
This recently planted tree has somehow become uprooted, even the wooden post is loose, and the tree is leaning over. It likely needs the post repositioned and maybe the tree replanted / adjusted. It's also a bit of a hazard of falling on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Lucy Street, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Graffiti, 12th April
item.description:
More graffiti appeared

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackwall Tunnel Southern Approach, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tall tree need cutting back outside 13 Samos Rd, 12th April
item.description:
I have reported this tree before but nothing was done. There is a very tall tree outside 13 & 13a Samos Road. The branches are hanging low and the whole tree needs cutting back or cutting down. The tree is too tall which means the roots are under my property. If this is not addressed quickly this will seriously impact my property, such as cracks in brick work or even subsidence. Please arrange for the tree works immediately before the leaves start to blossom and this also causes issue for the street cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light remains on 24 hrs a day., 12th April
item.description:
Wasting energy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossways Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on corner, 12th April
item.description:
Litter on corner of Chislehurst Road and Moorfield

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree root causing severe uplift to pavement and damage to kerb stones, 12th April
item.description:
This condition is a hazard to parking and roots continue to up lift pavement area. Tree is becoming too high and needs pruning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossways Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on corner Bassant Road and Swingate Lane, 12th April
item.description:
Fly tipping of various objects left on side of house. This is dangerous as a school is nearby.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swingate Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caged light broken, 12th April
item.description:
The BRONLY NORTH sign light is broken, facing the floor!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tweedy Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: First floor , Martin house rockingham estate, bin chute, 12th April
item.description:
Shooter overflow on first floor ..fly and Maggot infestation spreading to neighbours doors which will lead to people bringing them to their home via treading on them. This is health and safety as maggots hatch more egg until problem is solved. It is unclear if shooter is broken or rubbish has been jammed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falmouth Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove stumps and plant new trees, 12th April
item.description:
Several mature trees were cut down but the stumps have not been removed. Is it possible to get the stumps removed and replacement trees planted to fill the “gap” in the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Avenue, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris and litter 2, 12th April
item.description:
As with other report from further down the street after clearing overgrown brambles (vary promptly - thanks) the debris and litter needs removing and the verge returning to grass like the rest of the street. Also - trees were cut down but stumps need removing (and new trees planting?)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Avenue, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
